step_by_step_thinking: I agree with agent1’s assessment and recommendation. Given the possibility of maternal-fetal transmission due to the presence of active herpes zoster virus, initiating high-dose acyclovir immediately can significantly decrease the viral burden and mitigate risks of vertical transmission both intrauterinely and perinatally. This proactive approach aligns well with current guidelines aimed at reducing morbidity related to such exposures. Therefore, my final answer remains consistent with option B: Administer high dose acyclovir to the patient now.
